subject: Adopt SDC 500/503 fix
commit_message:
Adopt SDC 500/503 fix

- Adopt fix from SDC team for the Cassandra container
deployment: https://jira.onap.org/browse/SDC-715
- Remove SDC config files from config-init (moved to chart with ConfigMaps)
- Added entries for DCAE (this integration does not work yet)
- Make sure "helm upgrade" will upgrade deployments if config changed
- Make sure elasticsearch startup command exits only if elasticsearch process exited

Change-Id: I954e7ef3c493025921bff24e14e83c76f025c34e
Issue-ID: SDC-451
Signed-off-by: yuryn <Yury.Novitsky@Amdocs.com>

entries.message:
Patch Set 1:

(3 comments)

Michael Lando, could you please kindly review?

Patch Set 2:

Addressed comments.
Mounted the updated environment files to all containers.
Patch Set 3: Patch Set 2 was rebased

Patch Set 6:

Gentle reminder to review this change.
Opened new jira issue for the DCAE connectivity: https://jira.onap.org/browse/SDC-989

Abandoned

Following our discussion with Michael and SDC team, the SDC solution for k8s will be reviewed and published for review by the SDC team. 
The highlight of the change is that the initial data will be created from the init container and in case the data creation fails (chef process will test exit codes of the subprocesses), the pod creation will also fail and let k8s to retry. Also request timeout of the Cassandra client tools should be increased. It is already done for the Java SDC tool, it can be done for the cqlsh tool as well with --request-timeout parameter.
